response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the role's primary stack. Her background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, with measurable impact in high-throughput environments. The breadth of her experience and leadership in open-source projects further underscores her fit for a senior full-stack role.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack
Proven track record of designing and scaling end-to-end systems in high-throughput environments
Strong contributions to AI-agent development and open-source projects, demonstrating initiative and technical leadership
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though experience with Node.js and backend frameworks is extensive)
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team
Some roles involved niche languages (e.g., DLang), which may not directly translate to the required stack
